title: Pick Your Poison
body:
# Pick Your Poison

**A Fabric mod adding poison dart frogs in jungles, new effects obtained from these frogs and a new weapon: poison darts!**

![Froge](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/892378908555612190/955200058939297792/2022-03-20_21.23.01.png)

**Video showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6fby-ANNjVw**
